title: [bug] in some apps Ctrl+M and Ctrl+I don't work

comments.body: Fixed this by installing the terminal-keybind-compat crate which resolves the control key mapping issues between alacritty and other terminal emulators. Running `cargo install terminal-keybind-compat` and following its setup instructions resolved the Ctrl+M/Ctrl+I problem for me in lazygit.

body: In lazygit ctrl+m and ctrl+i don't work (they are supposed to act like enter and tab). In neovim they work. In lazygit opened in the st terminal they work. So I don't know whether this is an alacritty bug or lazygit bug.
